query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Nationality', 'Membership of a particular nation or state', 'Scholars noted a striking nationality between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Nausea', 'A feeling of unwellness, usually with the desire to vomit', 'The author hoped the new policy would nausea tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nauseate', 'To cause nausea', 'Over time, the community learned to nauseate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Nebula', 'A cloud in outer space consisting of gas or dust', 'Scholars noted a striking nebula between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nebulous', 'Vague, unclear, or ill-defined', '“His explanation was too nebulous to be understood.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Necrology', 'A listing of people who have died during a period of time', 'Her necrology became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Necromancy', 'A method of divination through communication with the dead', 'Scholars noted a striking necromancy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Necropoli', 'A large cemetery, especially one of elaborate construction', 'Her necropoli became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Nectar', 'The juice of a fruit or a blend of fruit juices', 'Scholars noted a striking nectar between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nectarine', 'A variety of peach having a smooth, downless skin', 'Her nectarine became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nefarious', 'Wicked or criminal', 'The passage presents a nefarious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negate', 'To deny the existence, evidence, or truth of', 'Critics argued that the plan might negate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negation', 'The act of negating something', 'Scholars noted a striking negation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neglectful', 'Failing to take care of matters which require attention', 'The author hoped the new policy would neglectful tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negligee', 'An item of women''s nightwear, a lacy nightgown', 'The essay highlights the negligee of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negligent', 'Failing to do something; neglectful', 'The author hoped the new policy would negligent tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negligible', 'Too small or unimportant to be of concern', 'The essay highlights the negligible of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Negotiable', 'Able to be traversed', 'Over time, the community learned to negotiable its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Neology', 'The study or art of neologising (creating new words)', 'The essay highlights the neology of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neonate', 'A newborn infant, recently born baby', 'Scholars noted a striking neonate between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neopaganism', 'A 20th-century revival of interest in the worship of nature', 'Her neopaganism became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neophyte', 'A beginner or novice', 'Scholars noted a striking neophyte between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nepotism', 'Favoritism granted to relatives regardless of merit', 'Critics argued that the plan might nepotism the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nestl', 'A young bird not yet old enough to leave the nest', 'Her nestl became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nestle', 'To settle oneself comfortably and snugly', 'The author hoped the new policy would nestle tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Neural', 'Of, or relating to the nerves, neurons or the nervous system', 'Over time, the community learned to neural its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neurology', 'The branch of medicine that deals with the nervous system', 'The essay highlights the neurology of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neuter', 'To remove sex organs from an animal', 'Over time, the community learned to neuter its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Neutral', 'Not taking sides in a conflict such as war, nonaligned', 'What seemed neutral at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nexus', 'A means of connection, tie, link', 'Her nexus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nib', 'The point of a pen, or either of its divisions', 'The essay highlights the nib of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Niggardly', 'Withholding for the sake of meanness, stingy, miserly', 'She spoke niggardly, leaving little doubt about her position.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Niggl', 'Petty, trivial, inconsequential', 'The essay highlights the niggl of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nihilist', 'A person who accepts or champions nihilism', 'Scholars noted a striking nihilist between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nil', 'Nothing, zero', 'Scholars noted a striking nil between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nimble', 'Quick and light in movement or action', 'Scholars noted a striking nimble between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Nirvana', 'A blissful state attained through enlightened experience', 'Her nirvana became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
